race.comment: HOUSEWIFE (12) was an effortless winner last time over 1435m at this track, scoring by 3.5 lengths. In form and expected to be in the finish again. MUSGRAVE (10) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then he was never in contention and was beaten 3 lengths when sixth over 1600m at Belmont Park four weeks ago. Perfectly placed and is sure to prove tough to beat. KINGS CALL (8) scored last start at this track to make it two wins from two starts this campaign. Sure to measure up again. STRIKING FELLA (9) finished 11th over 2106m at Geraldton at his most recent appearance on April 19. One to consider. BORDER FORCE (6) is building into the campaign nicely and can play a leading role.
